positive: A minimalist, aesthetically pleasing design featuring a central silhouette of a joyful celestial creature, like a stylized unicorn or winged fawn, galloping across a stylized gradient landscape. The style is a blend of elegant neo-tribal tattoo art and modern watercolor illustration, rendered with clean linework and deep jewel tones (indigo, teal, gold, and emerald). Composition must be circular or centered, designed for apparel placement. The creature should leave a trail of shimmering cosmic dust and abstract floral elements. High contrast, strong outlines, and vibrant, yet cohesive, color palette. Ideal for direct-to-garment print on a dark background.
